entity.name: Mesh LLM
entity.description: Democratize and Decentralize Models and Agents. Mesh LLM pools GPUs and memory across machines and exposes the result as one OpenAI-compatible API for distributed AI/LLM inference.

projects.name: Mesh LLM
projects.description: Distributed AI/LLM for the people. Share compute privately or publicly to power your agents and chat. Pools GPUs and memory across machines for distributed LLM inference using llama.cpp.

channels.description: GitHub Sponsors for one-time or recurring donations

plans.name: General support
plans.description: Support Mesh LLM development with any amount via GitHub Sponsors.

plans.name: Monthly supporter
plans.description: Recurring monthly support for ongoing Mesh LLM development and infrastructure.
